title: hyptis saxatilis
intro: Hyptis saxatilis, also known as Bushmint or Mexican Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hyptis saxatilis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
